interventions.label: Bite Reduction
interventions.description: Physical measures to reduce mosquito biting rate (bed nets, repellent)

parameters.name: adherence_min
parameters.label: Adherence
parameters.description: Minimum population adherence to the intervention

parameters.name: transmission_percentage
parameters.label: Transmission Reduction
parameters.description: Percentage reduction in transmission while intervention is active

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.label: Start Date
parameters.description: Date the intervention begins (leave blank for threshold-based)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.label: End Date
parameters.description: Date the intervention ends (leave blank for threshold-based)

parameters.name: start_threshold
parameters.label: Start Threshold
parameters.description: Proportion of infected population that triggers the intervention

parameters.name: end_threshold
parameters.label: End Threshold
parameters.description: Proportion of infected population below which the intervention stops

interventions.label: Vector Control
interventions.description: Chemical vector control reducing mosquito survival (spraying, larvicide)

parameters.name: adherence_min
parameters.label: Adherence
parameters.description: Minimum population adherence to the intervention

parameters.name: transmission_percentage
parameters.label: Transmission Reduction
parameters.description: Percentage reduction in transmission while intervention is active

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.label: Start Date
parameters.description: Date the intervention begins (leave blank for threshold-based)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.label: End Date
parameters.description: Date the intervention ends (leave blank for threshold-based)

parameters.name: start_threshold
parameters.label: Start Threshold
parameters.description: Proportion of infected population that triggers the intervention

parameters.name: end_threshold
parameters.label: End Threshold
parameters.description: Proportion of infected population below which the intervention stops

leaving.name: leaving
leaving.label: Outbound Travel Rate
leaving.description: Proportion of population traveling out of their zone per day

returning.name: returning
returning.label: Return Travel Rate
returning.description: Proportion of traveling population returning per day

admin_zone_fields.name: seroprevalence
admin_zone_fields.label: Seroprevalence
admin_zone_fields.description: Percentage of population with prior dengue exposure

disease_parameters.name: immunity_period
disease_parameters.label: Cross-Immunity Period
disease_parameters.description: Duration of cross-serotype immunity after primary infection (days). 0 = no cross-immunity.

simulation_parameters.name: run_mode
simulation_parameters.label: Run Mode
simulation_parameters.description: Run a single deterministic simulation or uncertainty analysis with multiple runs
